fallbackReason: Task subagent bun-eval parsing error; direct review per AGENTS.md guidance
summary: Feature adds a well-structured crossflows module with three trace utilities (issue-runtime, payment, integration-downstream) that prove shared-ID coherence for VAL-CROSS-003, VAL-CROSS-004, and VAL-CROSS-005. Each utility follows a consistent pattern: fetch the anchor entity, walk related artifacts, validate company_id/issue_id/agent_id coherence, and return violations. 29 tests cover positive, negative, edge, and integration-specific downstream scenarios.

observations: Clean barrel export via index.ts with proper type exports
Coherence validation is thorough — checks every linked artifact's company_id against the anchor
Null-safe handling for missing entities returns proper incoherent state
Payment trace correctly handles company-level invoices (no agent_id) without false violations
Tests use named integration-specific downstream proofs (Venice, Bankr, Composio, Uniswap) which strengthens VAL-CROSS-005 evidence
The .slice(0, 10) and .slice(0, 50) caps on runs/logs prevent unbounded queries
